case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. MARTIN DAVID DUARTE RUBIO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RUBIO, MARTIN DAVID DUARTE

ORDER (SC-222) ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $100.00 ON THE 30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING NOVEMBER 20, 2017 UNTIL DECEMBER 30, 2019, AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT WILL BE $90.00. DOES NOT INCLUDE INTEREST. IF THE PAYMENT IS NOT MADE IN FULL AND ON TIME, THE JDUGMENT CREDITOR MAY NOTIFY THE COURT TO CANCEL THE PAYMENT PLAN AND THE ENTIRE BALANCE WILL BECOME DUE AND COLLECTIBLE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUBIO, MARTIN DAVID DUARTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-11-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARTIN DAVID DUARTE RUBIO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUBIO, MARTIN DAVID DUARTE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
